# Raman Spectroscopy

**Summary**: A spectroscopic technique used to identify molecules based on their vibrational modes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-sadeed|SADEED, 2017]] used Raman spectroscopy to analyze brine samples after filtration to observe the release of stearic acid.
